results.V1_pool_dispatch_no_loss: PASS — pool_size=2 + 5 fast sub + 5 ev → 25 dispatch 完成
results.V2_drop_oldest: PASS — queue_max=2 + slow sub → 6 次 robot.subscribe_dropped emit, dropped_n 单调递增 [1..6], reason=drop_oldest
results.V3_drop_new: PASS — pool_size=1 queue_max=2 8 ev → 5 次 drop, reason=drop_new, 最早 d0/d1/d2 处理
results.V4_block_backpressure: PASS — block 模式无 drop, 全部 6 ev received, run elapsed≈0.162s 被回压
results.V5_mockup_sim_integration: PASS — cancel 仍工作, sequence_cancelled 1 次, action_done ts 单调
results.V6_regression_robot_006: PASS — verify_robot_006 子进程 rc=0 (V1-V8 全 PASS)

design_notes: 原 daemon-Thread-per-event 改为 N worker 线程从同一 bounded queue 阻塞 get；queue 真实反映 backlog。
drop_oldest: q.put_nowait 满则 get_nowait 丢最老一条再 put 新；reason 字段标记。
drop_new: 满则直接 _on_drop, 不入队。
block: q.put 阻塞直到有空位。
shutdown(wait, timeout): stop event + 排空 queue + sentinel + join worker + executor.shutdown(cancel_futures=True 兼容老 py 用 try)。
robot.subscribe_dropped emit payload: {event, reason, queue_max, dropped_n} dropped_n 滚动单调累计。
